Auth.signupSubtitle: Customers discover boutiques. Boutique owners register their studio after signup.
Auth.loginSubtitle: Access your dashboard, orders, and boutique portal.
Auth.passwordHint: Use a strong password with upper & lower case, a number, and a special character.
Auth.registeredMessage: Account created. Check your email if confirmation is required, then sign in.
Auth.supabaseNotConfigured: Supabase is not configured. Add credentials to .env.local.
Auth.signupFailed: Sign up failed. Please try again.
Auth.requestTimeout: Request timed out. Restart the dev server and try again.

Hero.subtitle: Discover highly rated boutiques, browse designer portfolios and get your dream outfits created with confidence — along with secure payments and verified reviews.

Footer.tagline: It All Starts With a Thread

Home.featuredClothingSubtitle: Outfits from verified boutiques across FADEN — tap any piece for photos, videos, and boutique details.

Alterations.title: Book an Alteration
Alterations.subtitle: Describe what you need — we'll match you with the nearest available boutique, often within 2 hours for urgent requests.
Alterations.alterationTypeHint: Hem, waist adjustment, sleeve length, fitting, etc.
Alterations.alterationTypePlaceholder: e.g. Shorten lehenga hem by 2 inches, tighten blouse waist…
Alterations.urgency: How soon do you need it?
Alterations.urgencyHint: Urgent requests (within 2 hours) are routed to the nearest open boutique.
Alterations.homeServiceHint: A boutique staff member can visit your location if available.
Alterations.homeAddressPlaceholder: Full address for pickup or home visit
Alterations.photosHint: Upload clear photos of the area that needs alteration.
Alterations.notesPlaceholder: Fabric type, event date, special instructions…
Alterations.matchingBoutique: We're matching you with the nearest available boutique.

RegisterBoutique.title: Register Your Boutique
RegisterBoutique.subtitle: List your portfolio, services, and trust signals to join India's boutique fashion platform.
